Quezon City's home for authentic charcoal-grilled burgers—smoky, fresh, and sulit with every order.

Why locals keep coming back

Kennedy's brings together smoky charcoal-grilled burgers, sulit promos, seafood sides, and a neighborhood-friendly ordering experience that's quick and convenient.

Smoky signature flavor Real charcoal grilling gives every burger a rich, fire-kissed taste that stands out from the usual fast-food bite.
Sulit choices for groups Mix burgers, seafood sides, and promos for family merienda, barkada cravings, or an easy dinner pickup.
Convenient local service From menu browsing to Messenger inquiries, everything is designed to make ordering simple for nearby customers.

Address

34 Wacat, La Loma, Quezon City, Metro Manila, Philippines

Store hours

Monday to Saturday: 3PM - 9PM

Local charcoal legend

Grilled for locals who want bold flavor fast

At Kennedy's, every order starts with real charcoal heat, juicy patties, and bold flavors made for locals who want a satisfying meal without the wait. Whether you're craving a sulit solo burger or a hearty combo for sharing, Kennedy's serves comfort food with a smoky edge.
